analyst_briefing: Domain reviews recommend hold across defence (EDIP contracts episodic), energy/tech (raw materials MoUs stable diversification), diplomatic (NATO-EU talks routine), with trade downgrade due to confirmed US tariff escalation—structural coercion per calibration, no offsets. Hybrid threats show Russian FIMI continuation on German elections (high confidence, sustained TTPs) and Belarus sabotage possible_linkage to prior Baltic probes (flag for registry). Actor postures escalate: Russia/China increased tempo in FIMI/influence ops eroding cohesion; US trade pressure weakening transatlantic ties; Belarus new grey-zone TTPs. Cross-flags prioritise WDM/SCEM (election/interference, hybrid nexus HIGH urgency); GMM FCW medium. No contested findings; persistent-state null requires baseline for score precision. Structural signals outweigh episodic: monitor US vector, Russian pre-election playbook for Q2 autonomy drift.
